chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الصَّدَقَةِ لِبَنِي هَاشِمٍ وَ مَوَالِيهِمْ وَ صِلَتِهِمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 89 – The charity to the Clan of Hashim and their slaves and their connected ones

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/192)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/192)
text: كَانَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَسْأَلُ شِهَاباً مِنْ زَكَاتِهِ لِمَوَالِيهِ وَ إِنَّمَا حُرِّمَتِ الزَّكَاةُ عَلَيْهِمْ دُونَ مَوَالِيهِمْ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Sa’alba Bin Maymoun who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> used to ask Shihaab (to give) his<sup>asws</sup> Zakat to his<sup>asws</sup> slaves, and rather the Zakat is Probibited unto them<sup>asws</sup> but (it is permissible for our<sup>asws</sup>) slaves’.
en.sarwar: 10. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Muhammad ibn Isma‘il from Tha’labah ibn Maymun who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would ask Shihab (ibn ‘Abd Rabbihi) to pay zakat due from him to his (Imam’s) servants. It is not permissible for them (’A’immah) to receive zakat, but it is permissible for their servants.”
